lede: A look at December 17 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including David Rudisha and Émilie du Châtelet, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: December 1970 protests in Poland
events.desc: Polish protests: In Gdynia, soldiers fire at workers emerging from trains, killing dozens.

events.title: Harold Holt
events.desc: Harold Holt, Prime Minister of Australia, disappears while swimming near Portsea, Victoria, and is presumed drowned.

events.title: Civil Rights Congress
events.desc: The American Civil Rights Congress delivers "We Charge Genocide" to the United Nations.

events.title: Finnish Security and Intelligence Service
events.desc: The Finnish Security Police is established to remove communist leadership from its predecessor, the State Police.

events.title: World War II
events.desc: World War II: Battle of the River Plate: The Admiral Graf Spee is scuttled by Captain Hans Langsdorff outside Montevideo.

events.title: American Civil War
events.desc: American Civil War: General Ulysses S. Grant issues General Order No. 11, expelling Jews from parts of Tennessee, Mississippi, and Kentucky.

events.title: Aztec sun stone
events.desc: The Aztec calendar stone is discovered at El Zócalo, Mexico City.

events.title: Cologne War
events.desc: Cologne War: Forces under Ernest of Bavaria defeat troops under Gebhard Truchsess von Waldburg at the Siege of Godesberg.

events.title: William Longsword
events.desc: Assassination of William I of Normandy.

events.title: Sack of Rome (546)
events.desc: Siege of Rome: The Ostrogoths under king Totila plunder the city, by bribing the Eastern Roman garrison.

deaths.text: Kim Jong Il, North Korean commander and politician, second Supreme Leader of North Korea
Harold Holt, Australian lawyer and politician, 17th Prime Minister of Australia
Leopold II of Belgium, King of the Belgians from 1865 to 1909
Francis Beaufort, Irish hydrographer and officer in the Royal Navy
Simón Bolívar, Venezuelan general and politician, second President of Venezuela

observances.text: Christian feast day: Josep Manyanet i Vives
Christian feast day: Lazarus of Bethany (local commemoration in Cuba)
